title: phanera glabrifolia var. maritima
intro: Phanera glabrifolia var. maritima, also known as the sea-fluted rattan, is a variety of plant that belongs to the family Moraceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Phanera glabrifolia var. maritima include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's stems and roots are often used to make infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
